## Summary

Describe the problem and the proposed change.

## Related Issue

Link the related Issue, or explain why one is not needed.

## Validation

List the commands, fixtures, or manual checks used to validate the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated edits.
- [ ] Relevant deterministic checks pass locally.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has a test or reproducible example when practical.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated when required.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or confidential material are included.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under the applicable license.
